case_title: JONJOSEPH BERRY VS. ERP OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2019 - JUDGMENT.

ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT ERP OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP A ILLINOIS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $0.00 - SERVED MAY-10-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ERP OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP A ILLINOIS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BERRY, JONJOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ERP OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP A ILLINOIS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $530.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY BERRY, JONJOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT ERP OPERATING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP A ILLINOIS LIMITED PARTNERSHIP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JONJOSEPH BERRY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ERP OPERATIING LIMITED PARTNERSHIP IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-05-2019 08:30 AM FOR DEPT 506
